center.name: 卡拉巴松
center.summary: 卡拉巴松是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Calabarzon babbler，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Contrary to its name, it is also found outside the Calabarzon region where it also inhabits Central Luzon, Bicol Peninsula and Catanduanes

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Contrary to its name, it is also found outside the Calabarzon region where it also inhabits Central Luzon, Bicol Peninsula and Catanduanes
